title: I Feel Fine
content:
I think I should post something in order to push the previous entry down, so that the photos don’t show up on the first page. I can’t stand looking at those photos myself.

So a quick update, the wound seems to be healing nicely. Almost no pain at all after the first 24 hours. Except for the fact that I have a bandage on my neck, the only time I feel noticable pain is when I turned my head too quickly.

That should do it. The photos should be gone. ;)

By the way, it is HOT in Bangkok.

P.S. The Bishop has read my post!!! Grrrrr… (That’s the sound of happiness. Heh.)
